title: Year Guesser: Space Exploration
description: Guess when these space milestones happened

questions.question: When was Sputnik, the first artificial satellite, launched?
questions.explanation: The Soviet Union launched Sputnik 1 on October 4, 1957.

questions.question: When did Yuri Gagarin become the first human in space?
questions.explanation: Gagarin orbited Earth on April 12, 1961 aboard Vostok 1.

questions.question: When did the first Moon landing happen?
questions.explanation: Apollo 11 landed on the Moon on July 20, 1969.

questions.question: When was the International Space Station launched?
questions.explanation: The first ISS module (Zarya) launched on November 20, 1998.

questions.question: When did the Space Shuttle Challenger disaster occur?
questions.explanation: Challenger broke apart 73 seconds after launch on January 28, 1986.

questions.question: When did the Voyager 1 spacecraft launch?
questions.explanation: Voyager 1 launched on September 5, 1977 and is now the farthest human-made object.

questions.question: When did SpaceX successfully land a Falcon 9 rocket for the first time?
questions.explanation: SpaceX landed Falcon 9 at Cape Canaveral on December 21, 2015.

questions.question: When did the Mars rover Curiosity land on Mars?
questions.explanation: Curiosity landed in Gale Crater on August 6, 2012.

questions.question: When was Pluto reclassified as a dwarf planet?
questions.explanation: The IAU reclassified Pluto as a dwarf planet on August 24, 2006.

questions.question: When did the Hubble Space Telescope take its first photo?
questions.explanation: Hubble took its first image on May 20, 1990, just weeks after launch.

questions.question: When did the first woman (Valentina Tereshkova) go to space?
questions.explanation: Tereshkova orbited Earth aboard Vostok 6 on June 16, 1963.

questions.question: When did the Perseverance rover land on Mars?
questions.explanation: Perseverance landed in Jezero Crater on February 18, 2021.

questions.question: When was the first space station (Salyut 1) launched?
questions.explanation: The Soviet Union launched Salyut 1 on April 19, 1971.

questions.question: When did New Horizons fly by Pluto?
questions.explanation: New Horizons flew past Pluto on July 14, 2015, capturing the first close-up images.

questions.question: When did the James Webb Space Telescope launch?
questions.explanation: JWST launched on December 25, 2021 from French Guiana.
